message:
bd-3bxhj.3.7: IR explainer tooling (graph dumps, provenance traces, pass diffs)

Add ir_explainer.rs with:
- dump_graph(): human-readable and machine-readable IR graph inspection
- trace_provenance(): source location tracing with file filtering
- compute_pass_diffs(): normalization pass diffs with semantic-change
  classification (Ordering, Desugaring, Pruning, Deduplication, etc.)
- triage_summary(): health assessment for failure triage and certification
  (detects orphan nodes, missing cleanup, empty provenance)

20 tests, clippy clean. Also fixes unused import in ir_versioning tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
